title: Suven Pharmaceuticals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Suven Pharmaceuticals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Suven Pharmaceuticals in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Suven Pharmaceuticals:
Suven Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Suven Pharmaceuticals!
